commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: sumit_rezervacije
      POSTGRES_USER: sumit_user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: changeme123
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"

  pgadmin:
    image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: admin@sumit.ba
      PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: admin123
    ports:
      - "5050:80"
    depends_on:
      - db

  api:
    build: .
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "8000:8000"
    env_file:
      - .env
    depends_on:
      - db
    volumes:
      - ./credentials.json:/app/credentials.json
      - ./uploads:/app/uploads

volumes:
  postgres_data:
